basic_details.job_title: JIPMER Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Social Worker, Teacher and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Jawaharlal Institute of Postgraduate Medical Education & Research (JIPMER)
basic_details.post_name: Project Posts (Social Worker, Dietician, Teacher, Patient Navigator)

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's in Social Work with minimum 1 year experience, Bachelor's in Social Work with minimum 3 years experience, Master's in Nursing with relevant experience, Postgraduate degree in Food and Nutrition/Food Service Management and Dietetics/ Institutional Management and Dietetics from a recognized University or equivalent AND 1 year experience as a Dietitian in a Hospital or Medical Institute, Degree in Home Science from a recognized University or equivalent; Postgraduate diploma in Dietetics from a recognized University/ Institute or equivalent AND 2 years' experience as a Dietitian in a Hospital or Medical Institute, B.Ed with any degree, 12th Pass
qualification.details: Social Worker: Master's in Social Work with minimum 1 year experience; Bachelor's in Social Work with minimum 3 years experience; Master's in Nursing with relevant experience Dietician: Postgraduate degree in Food and Nutrition/Food Service Management and Dietetics/ Institutional Management and Dietetics from a recognized University or equivalent AND 1 year experience as a Dietitian in a Hospital or Medical Institute OR Degree in Home Science from a recognized University or equivalent; Postgraduate diploma in Dietetics from a recognized University/ Institute or equivalent AND 2 years' experience as a Dietitian in a Hospital or Medical Institute Teacher: B.Ed with any degree Patient Navigator: 12th Pass

salary_details.details: Social Worker: Rs. 28000 Per Month Dietician: Rs. 28000 Per Month Teacher: Rs. 25000 Per Month Patient Navigator: Rs. 10400 Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JIPMER Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for JIPMER Project Posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the JIPMER Project Posts is 20th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Project Posts at JIPMER?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for the Project Posts, including positions for Social Worker, Dietician, Teacher, and Patient Navigator.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for JIPMER Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via Email. Candidates need to send their applications to the designated email address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the JIPMER Project Posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the Project Posts at JIPMER is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Patient Navigator post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Patient Navigator post is Rs. 10400 Per Month.

faq.question: Q6. Are there any application fees for JIPMER Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there are no application fees mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What are the educational qualifications required for the Social Worker post?
faq.answer: For the Social Worker post, candidates need a Master's in Social Work with at least 1 year of experience, or a Bachelor's in Social Work with at least 3 years of experience, or a Master's in Nursing with relevant experience.

faq.question: Q8. Which posts are included in the JIPMER Project Posts recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment includes Project Posts for Social Worker, Dietician, Teacher, and Patient Navigator.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for these JIPMER posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for these JIPMER posts will be based on shortlisting of applications.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for JIPMER Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
